Notes: Single UPDATE adds and then deletes the same A RR for ord.campus.edu. within one message. The follow-up QUERY checks whether the RRset remains absent after the UPDATE.

Steps.Description: Add ord.campus.edu. A 192.0.2.50, then delete the same RR in the same UPDATE message.

Steps.Name: ord.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset is absent after the UPDATE.
